channelId.description: Channel id that will contain this live video

permanentLive.description: User can stream multiple times in a permanent live

latencyMode.description: User can select live latency mode if enabled by the instance

previewfile.description: Deprecated in PeerTube v8.1, use thumbnailfile instead

support.description: A text tell the audience how to support the creator
support.example: Please support our work on https://soutenir.framasoft.org/en/ <3

nsfw.description: Whether or not this live video/replay contains sensitive content

nsfwSummary.description: More information about the sensitive content of the video

tags.description: Live video/replay tags (maximum 5 tags each between 2 and 30 characters)

downloadEnabled.description: Enable or disable downloading for the replay of this live video

400.description:
Disambiguate via `code`:
- default type for a validation error
- `live_conflicting_permanent_and_save_replay` for conflicting parameters set

403.description:
Disambiguate via `code`:
- `live_not_enabled` for a disabled live feature
- `live_not_allowing_replay` for a disabled replay feature
- `max_instance_lives_limit_reached` for the absolute concurrent live limit
- `max_user_lives_limit_reached` for the user concurrent live limit
